docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,050.00 FILED BY DIEZ, EUGENIO AS TO DEFENDANT BARSANA, REMEDIOS A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARSANA, REMEDIOS A.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-08-1999, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO SEP-23-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIEZ, EUGENIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARSANA, REMEDIOS A. $870.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $890.00, PLAINTIFF TO RETURN CAR TO DEFENDANT WITHIN 14 DAYS SOF THE MAILING OF JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT BARSANA, REMEDIOS A.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 26086, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIEZ, EUGENIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BARSANA, REMEDIOS A. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 26086 ON 12-1-99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
